generated_exposure.exposure_text: Our civil defense systems are failing because of reckless budget cuts pushed by short-sighted politicians. Last year's regional drills showed critical gaps in emergency response coordination - gaps that wouldn't exist if we hadn't outsourced preparedness to private contractors who cut corners for profit. We need to bring these vital functions back under public control before it's too late. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
